---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature you'd like, as specifically as possible.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you considered, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features in other apps.
